question: What is the main function of the device recently discovered in desert ruins?

answers.original: The main function of the device recently discovered in desert ruins is to stabilize localized temporal distortions and prevent chaotic time anomalies.
answers.perturbed:
The main function of the device recently discovered in the Desert Ruins is time regulation.
